programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Madagascar: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: Madagascar is truly a weird and wonderful land. Isolated on an island of extreme and magical looking locations, life has adapted and diversified. With few predators, numbers have proliferated and natural selection has gone mad.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
programme.desc: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa. At its summit, temperatures fluctuate from over 30 degrees celsius to below freezing.
programme.sub-title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise’s paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: By working through his past problems, Tom Warshaw, an American artist living in Paris, begins to discover his true self and returns home to reconcile with his family and friends. Starring: David Duchovny, Téa Leoni, Robin Williams

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Rise Of The Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London’s East End for years to come.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Bless The Child
programme.desc: Cody, a little girl abandoned by her mother and raised by her aunt, a nurse, is kidnapped. The girl's guardian, aided by an F.B.I. agent, learn that Cody has supernatural abilities. Feat: Kim Basinger, Jimmy Smits & Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: Danger Death Ray
programme.desc: Danger Death Ray: A slick secret agent investigates an evil organization that stole a top secret death ray.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: A dour production of Shakespeare’s play produced for German TV. A prince returns home for his father’s funeral and doesn’t like what he finds.

programme.title: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion.

programme.title: The Rebel Set
programme.desc: Three coffee shop customers help an owner rob an armored car.

programme.title: Samson vs. The Vampire Women
programme.desc: While Mike and the Bots wrestle with Samson vs. the Vampire Women, TV's Frank is assumed into Second Banana Heaven.

programme.title: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Manhunt In Space: An early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital plus a movie made of several TV episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A swarm of giant grasshoppers, inadvertently created by a radioactive experiment, heads for Chicago.

programme.title: Overdrawn At The Memory Bank
programme.desc: A weather tech's mind gets trapped in a computer and Pearl establishes her own public television pledge program.

programme.title: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: Jungle Goddess: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Scare-A-Normal-Activity / Beast Feast

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Seven Foot itch / Being McGee

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 112
programme.desc: Can steak be tenderized with explosives? Does driving while angry decrease fuel efficiency?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 204
programme.desc: Are people actually well-acquainted with the backs of their own hands? Can a needle be thrown through a glass pane without shattering it? Is it really impossible to ride a bicycle underwater?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 213
programme.desc: If a single car brakes lightly, can it cause a ripple that triggers a major traffic jam? Is it better to stay in one lane in heavy traffic instead of changing lanes?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 106
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a lead balloon fly? Is it possible to surf a wave caused by an explosion?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 159
programme.desc: When you get "cold feet," do your feet actually get colder? When the poop hits the fan, does everyone get covered in the ensuing chaos?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 11
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an airplane toilet create enough suction to cause a person to become stuck on it? Can a can of biscuit dough explode in a hot car?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 105
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a bullet from a 9mm handgun ignite a propane tank? Can a speed boat jump off of a ramp, land in the water and continue to operate safely?

programme.title: MythBusters: Ultimate MythBusters Special
programme.desc: Every episode, Jamie and Adam put themselves and their skills to the test in the pursuit of answers to myths. But what do they really do? What attributes do you need to bust a myth?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 209
programme.desc: Can concentrated hydrofluoric acid in a bathtub completely dissolve a human body, create a hole through the tub and dissolve the bathroom floor below it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 40
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person make a parachute with an airplane escape slide? Can a stewardess survive a 33,000-foot fall while still strapped into her seat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 67
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a hybrid rocket be propelled with salami? Is it more efficient to drive a truck with its tailgate up than down? Can a sword slice a machine gun barrel?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 117
programme.desc: Can a conventional electric stun gun be turned into a water-powered electric stun gun? Is firewalking real? Can a fire be put out by placing a fire extinguisher into it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 164
programme.desc: Can honey bees lift a laptop? Can hitting a bug at high speeds on a motorcycle be fatal? Can hanging a bag of water repel flies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 227
programme.desc: Could Luke have safely swung across the chasm in the Death Star while carrying Princess Leia? Would the Ewoks' swinging log trap have destroyed an Imperial walker?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 66
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an air cylinder go straight through a cinder-block wall or propel a boat? Can a passing train suck a person onto the tracks?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 28
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be blown away by a bullet? Can a certain note make a person have fecal incontinence? Does Chinese water torture work?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 43
programme.desc: Myths tested: Did the Confederates really have a two-stage rocket capable of traveling 100 miles from Richmond to DC?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tube Escape, Box of Reptiles, Hurricane Slide
programme.desc: A contestant will be put in a clear tube just above water. Snakes and lizards will then be dumped in the box.
programme.sub-title: Tube Escape, Box of Reptiles, Hurricane Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.
programme.sub-title: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build

programme.title: Fear Factor: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.
programme.sub-title: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangled from a rope off a roof. Contestants will also have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon.
programme.sub-title: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll

programme.title: Fear Factor: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang
programme.desc: Contestants will have to play miniature golf to determine the size of a sea cucumber they will have to eat. They will also be seated on the back of a jet ski driven by a professional driver.
programme.sub-title: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer
programme.desc: Contestant will be wrapped in a vest of chains. The contestants will crawl, climb and swim through an obstacle. In this stunt the contestant will be sitting in a helicopter flying approx. 20' over the water.
programme.sub-title: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand
programme.desc: Three co-ed couples will be placed on a tight rope and suspended over water in a heart-pounding stunt. In another, players will be stacked in boxes.
programme.sub-title: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand

programme.title: Fear Factor: Family Beam Walk, Family of Roaches, Kid-a-Pult
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.
programme.sub-title: Family Beam Walk, Family of Roaches, Kid-a-Pult

programme.title: Fear Factor: Underwater Limo Escape, Gross Blow Tube, Car Building Couples Rescue
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.
programme.sub-title: Underwater Limo Escape, Gross Blow Tube, Car Building Couples Rescue

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Platform Escape, Roadkill Cafe
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the ladies of Fear Factor, escaping from a helicoper platform and eating roadkill.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp
programme.desc: Contestants will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water.
programme.sub-title: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter
programme.desc: Contestants ride a bicycle on top of semi trucks, squeeze the juices out of hornworms, and walk on a beam between buildings in this jaw-dropping episode.
programme.sub-title: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong
programme.desc: In one bizarre stunt from this episode, contestants must wear a helmet filled with moray eels. In another, they ride on a moving platform to retrieve flags.
programme.sub-title: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed into a helmet filled with spiders in one horrifying stunt, then couples will be bound to a platform by their ankles in another.
programme.sub-title: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing
programme.desc: A contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrists then locked to the face of a wheel, half underwater. Contestants must also stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter in this sibling-themed episode.
programme.sub-title: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing chain mail, shoot a flaming arrow at a scarecrow target, and be placed in a coffin filled with bugs.
programme.sub-title: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.
programme.sub-title: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall

programme.title: Fear Factor: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.
programme.sub-title: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie
programme.desc: Contestants will stand on a car suspended over the water by a crane and more in this exciting episode.
programme.sub-title: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow

programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Looking Back

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Gore at War
programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Storm Access

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Reveal

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Illusion of Hope

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Standing Tall
programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: With his Duel Runner on the line, Yusei finds himself dueling against a bully who battles with a deck full of bugs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Looking to get his Stardust Dragon card back from Jack Atlas, Yusei takes off in a race against time and Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 1
programme.desc: After making it through to New Domino City, Yusei confronts his old friend Jack Atlas and challenges him to a Turbo Duel.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Jack and Yusei comes to a climatic close, a mysterious creature appears as their two Dragons duke it out.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to The Facility, Yusei befriends an odd old man who duels with a treasure deck full of ancient mystic cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei duels the top dog at The Facility using Yanagi's treasure deck. Meanwhile, Jack learns about the mystery surrounding his Mark of the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fire It Up!
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 1
programme.desc: After being freed from the Facility, Yusei risks being re-incarcerated when he tries to take back his Duel Runner from Sector Security's vault.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: A failed New York playwright awkwardly navigates the transition from Next Big Thing to Last Year's News. Starring: Kristen Wiig, Annette Bening, Matt Dillon, Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson
programme.desc: Barney Thompson is a downtrodden barber who comically manages to become an unlikely serial killer, whilst attempting to evade a determined detective.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: When his son's body is found in a humiliating accident, a lonely high school teacher (Robin Williams, "Mrs. Doubtfire") covers up the truth with a phony suicide note.

programme.title: You, Me and Him
programme.desc: Olivia is a career-driven lawyer in a stable relationship with her younger girlfriend, Alex. Olivia has no interest in children - until the day she finds herself sobbing uncontrollably over a friend's pregnancy.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: Keep The Aspidistra Flying
programme.desc: When successful advertiser, Gordon Comstock (Richard E. Grant), abruptly walks away from his career to pursue his dream of being a poet, his path is much more difficult than expected and soon financial problems begin to pile up.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Middleton, Manchester to investigate claims that a sad cavalier named Edward is haunting this location. Ring O Bells has also been used for druid rituals. Will he be able to summon any spirits tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2
programme.desc: As Sean continues his investigation at The Ring O Bells pub, he finds that out that there is more haunting this location, than just the spirits lurking behind the bar.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean investigates one of the UK's most haunted pubs, with is very own dungeon. Haunted by multiple spirits, it appears to be very active and Sean is not prepared for what happens to Paul.
programme.sub-title: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub
programme.desc: Sean explores The Shakespeare pub in Manchester and meets Flecky Bennett to investigate claims dating back hundreds of years, about an evil chef that is haunting the pub.
programme.sub-title: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stanton Moor, Derbyshire and encounters a portal to the spirit dimension within a mystical stone circle, used for witchcraft and occult practices. With no outside interference, the activity is off the scale.
programme.sub-title: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: We visit a run down house in Kent, a terraced house in Chingford, and a bungalow in Hampshire, finding out who buys them and what they pay for them when they go under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a house in Haslemere, school in Nottingham and industrial unit in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Harrogate, Stoke and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at homes in Folkstone, Derby and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 25
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit an end of terrace in Sittingbourne, a house in Watford and in Alverston Derby Martin visits a two up two down.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a grand but run-down three bedroom house in Cardiff, a three bedroom property in Southampton with a great view and a flat in Maida Vale, north-west London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon, Liverpool and North London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a family home in Dorset, a one-bedroom flat in Canterbury and a terrace in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 18
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a 3-bed property in Exeter which is sure to keep you on the straight and narrow; a 5 lock-up garage site in Gillingham Kent and a 3-bed semi-detached family house in Staffordshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a plot of land in Suffolk, a property in a desirable town in Kent and in Liverpool it seems that it's not just the house priced that are collapsing.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Reading, Nottingham and Kent

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 1
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Wales, a top floor flat in London which could be a little ray of sunshine and a Ramsgate property that doesn't look all it's crack up to be.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a two bedroomed mid terraced in Stoke-on-Trent, a three bedroomed house in Hampshire with no roof and a semi detached house in Leeds.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a Victorian villa in Derby, a plot of land in Kent and a house in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Woman On The Run
programme.desc: Frank Johnson flees police after becoming an eyewitness to murder. He is pursued around scenic San Francisco by his wife, a reporter, the police, and... the real murderer.

programme.title: Shock
programme.desc: A psychologically distraught woman is committed to a private sanitarium by the man she witnessed commit a murder.

programme.title: Spaced Out
programme.desc: When three voluptuous female aliens crash-land in an English park, the result is close encounters of the sauciest kind! Three hapless men witness the UFO's arrival and are kidnapped by the sexy extra-terrestrials who discover the joys of first contact!

programme.title: The Devil's Plaything
programme.desc: A lesbian vampire's soul is kept on in the bodies of her descendants.

programme.title: The Centerfold Girls
programme.desc: A depraved religious fanatic sets out to punish all the "immoral" women who have posed for the center-fold of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Highlander 3 - The Sorcerer
programme.desc: In feudal Japan, Connor McLeod seeks out an immortal master of illusion. He is followed by Kane. They fight and Kane is trapped in a cave. In the present, Connor's peace is destroyed when Kane is released and the struggle of the Gathering begins again.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Hunter: Snow Queen Part 1
programme.desc: McCall's prime informant in a case against a drug merchant is a cocaine supplier who's being extradited as a murder witness by a policeman who seems intent on killing her.

programme.title: Hunter: Snow Queen Part 2
programme.desc: Dee Dee's in danger as she moves closer to exposing a ruthless drug dealer. Hunter fights to keep a rogue policeman from killing a material witness.

programme.title: Hunter: Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boy arrives in Los Angeles from Hawaii, picks up his luggage and heads for his car. The next day, he arrives at Eddy Marks' house and shoots him down in his kitchen.

programme.title: Hunter: Guilty
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go after a convicted murderer who is back out on the street and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.

programme.title: Hunter: The Last Kill
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go after a contract killer who is making hits throughout the city in order to ingratiate himself with a criminal kingpin in order to kill him.

programme.title: Hunter: Fireman
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall are brought in to help solve an arsonist/murder case. Someone has been setting fires in empty warehouses all over the city.

programme.title: Hunter: Sniper
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes who remind him of the wife who jilted him 18 years ago.

programme.title: Hunter: Case X
programme.desc: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.

programme.title: Hunter: Night of the Dragons
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of a killing in Chinatown leads them to a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest in the case.

programme.title: Hunter: Biggest Man in Town
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Rich Girl
programme.desc: When a millionaire is nearly killed, his wife is the primary heir and prime suspect -- until she's murdered. Hunter goes undercover to find the real killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Killer in a Halloween Mask
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become involved in a string of bizarre murders when they're assigned as technical advisors for a television show.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 1
programme.desc: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat who's immune from prosecution, Hunter turns renegade and follows the man to his homeland.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 2
programme.desc: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.

programme.title: Hunter: Six Million Dollar Misunderstanding
programme.desc: A security guard-turned-thief loses the money he stole and searches for it with Hunter and McCall in close pursuit.

programme.title: Hunter: The Big Fall
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness who's set to testify before a grand jury.

programme.title: Hunter: Waiting for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.

programme.title: Hunter: Think Blue
programme.desc: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason race each other in monster trucks. Tim finds out if super diesel produces more horsepower than standard diesel. Vicki challenges 17-year-old Tom Cave to a bit of rally racing.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason battle it out on the track in go-karts; Tom Ford tests the Renault Laguna; actor Dick Benedict joins Jonny Smith in a luxury road test.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this packed episode of "Fifth Gear," Tom Ford delivers a verdict on the new Volkswagen Scirocco, Vicki heads to the track to test out Porsches and Tiff tests out the world's first underwater car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford conducts a shocking crash test that could prove to be essential viewing for family motorists; Tim hits the road with the latest camera alerting systems.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford performs the only televised test of the Dodge Challenger; Jonny Smith heads to the Ultimate Street Car show at Santa Pod to judge the "Show & Shine" competition.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the season finale, "Fifth Gear" visits the Firecracker Banger, an event where even rare classic cars get a glorious, fiery send-off.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim reveals the best way for motorists to wash their cars; Jason pits three gold-medalist sailors against one another in a track race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC vs. the Mercedes CLS; Jonny Smith becomes an ice cream man for the day to test out the newly revamped Citroen Berlingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny looks into budget convertibles, which go for even lower prices during the winter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato joins Britain's best downhill skier, Chemmy Alcott, to drive a Group N rally car; Tom Ford drives the Citroen C5 in Lisbon; Tiff takes a look at the latest Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato finds out how fast cricketer Shane Warne is on a track. Jonny Smith and Tom Ford compare diesel and petrol Minis, and Tiff compares the new Subaru Impreza to a previous version.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the brand new Audi S5 against the BMW 335i. Then, England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim heads to London to investigate the new craze of car share clubs; Jason Plato meets up with celebrity chef James Martin, whose enviable car collection includes a busted Formula One.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell drives the Lamborghini Gallardo Superleggera; DJ Christian O'Connell is challenged to a stunt driving routine.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan Thomas accepts a stunt challenge from world-famous precision driver Russ Swift.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato test two roadsters on the track; Tom Ford tests the sexy new Maserati GranTurismo coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Car nut Tim Shaw joins the team to tackle ways to spend less money on fuel; Tom tests Ford's new Kuga SUV; Jonny sees if a car is actually worth more as scrap than as a functional vehicle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford visits billionaire Bernie Ecclestone's sprawling garage to explore his rare collection before he auctions off more than 50 of these unique models.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith hunts down three cars that fall within budget for parents on their first year of motoring.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Olympic rowing gold medalist Matthew Pinsent tests sports cars. Tim tries to discover if manufacturers' economy claims transfer to the real world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom and Jonny enter the grueling Exeter Trial, a 24-hour off-road driving event that has been held for 100 years, in an old Volkswagen Beetle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff gets to drive the Aston Martin DBS, the latest James Bond car; Jonny Smith embarks on a 600-mile transcontinental trip to test out the world's first diesel Grand Tourer.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim investigates the government's new scrappage system that promises cash in exchange for bangers; Tiff and Jason race a pair of double-decker buses.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim uncovers just how many motorists don't check their oil.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two fast estates; Tom Ford tests the latest Honda Accord and assists the HM Plant Honda Superbike Team along the way.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato meets Paul Vickery, captain of the England rugby team; Tom Ford journeys to the Arctic to test the Volvo XC70 in extreme conditions; Tiff Needell tests out the Lexus IS-F.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out how quick the police are on a racing track. Then, Jonny loads up some small economy cars to find out of they can still climb one of Britain's biggest hills.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tries to find some fine coupes for less than £1,500.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Paddy McGuinness returns to take his motorbike test; Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shootout; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Mini's chic rival, the Fiat 500; "Fifth Gear" tests whether fuel additives really work by scientifically analyzing four different brands.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the new 207 GTi is as exhilarating to drive as the 20-year-old hot hatch grandmaster, the 205GTi.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson returns to Anglesey for more shootouts; Tom Ford visits Spain to drive the new Land Cruiser; Jason Plato drives the Mercedes CLK63 Black.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Thrills
programme.desc: The intimate thoughts of a twisted mind would be enough to stun a community and horrify the world. But thoughts alone may not be enough to turn someone into a killer. This is a bizarre journey into the world of women who kill for twisted thrills.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Anger, fear and despair are basic human emotions. But when these emotions are coupled with a broken mind, a perfect storm is created. Teetering on the edge of unbalance, these women resort to murder when pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Possessions
programme.desc: A grandmother caring for her grandchildren, a young girl in love with a boy, and a mother protecting her son are consumed with intense love. But when that love is threatened, they find it too much to bear and take measures into their own hands.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: These women burn madly with anger so deep they'll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn on the ones they love? Find out as we explore the reasons for a lover's revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Some killers are so troubled that their actions are almost impossible to comprehend. Welcome to the shadow land of the insane and psychopathic as we enter the haunting world of the disturbed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill For Cash
programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Inconvenient Marriage
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion; it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is love's gloomy shadow, and it can drive women into the darkest corners of their mind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?
programme.sub-title: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The O'Hare UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard investigates a UFO sighting over Chicago's O'Hare airport that was witnessed by dozens of people, including an airline captain, his crew and several airport officials.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Ouija Boards?
programme.desc: Harmless board game or portal to the spirit world? Richard delves into the history and folklore of 'talking boards' with a collector of Ouija boards and a world renowned paranormal investigator.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the practice of past-life regression therapy; a technique where subjects are placed under hypnosis in order to recover memories of supposed past lives.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Why Files: Hole to Hell / Chronovisor: The Vatican's Crystal Ball
programme.desc: Miners find a portal to hell. / The Vatican may be hiding a device that allows them to peer backwards in time.
programme.sub-title: Hole to Hell / Chronovisor: The Vatican's Crystal Ball

programme.title: The Why Files: 13,000-Year-Old Satellite
programme.desc: AJ examines the Black Knight Satellite, an object orbiting Earth that has been watching us for 13,000 years.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Are we really running out of oil, or does the government and Big Oil just want us to think we are? Two proponents of the abiotic oil theory argue that oil is not a fossil fuel and actually replenishes itself deep within the earth.
programme.sub-title: Are We Running Out of Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the medical profession, drug companies, the food industry and government agencies are suppressing a cure for cancer.
programme.sub-title: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Center of the Earth

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?
programme.sub-title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.
programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)

programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food

programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.desc: Follow the early Beatles as they work the club scene in Hamburg en route to their ultimate eternalized fame and influence.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Daft Punk
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Daft Punk. Daft Punk's story is told chronologically through their major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Daft Punk.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Whitney Houston
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Whitney Houston. Whitney's story is told chronologically through her major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Whitney Houston.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Daryl Hall
programme.desc: Hall of Fame singer Daryl Hall talks about his music career and his passion for restoring old homes.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road: There Are Places I Remember (1940-1958)
programme.desc: An intimate retelling of the goings-on surrounding the four Beatles' upbringings and early pre-Beatles years.

programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Billy Idol
programme.desc: Robert Elms and director David Mallet discuss Billy Idol. Topics include his music video contribution and influence during the early years of MTV. This episode features Idol's music videos from "White Wedding" and "Eyes Without a Face".

programme.title: The Big Interview: Rod Stewart
programme.desc: Rod Stewart is still rocking out fifty years into his career: he has a hit Las Vegas residency, continues to pack arenas around the world, and has a new album out. He's left his mark on rock & roll, and he talks to Dan Rather about his life and legacy.

programme.title: The Big Interview
programme.desc: The multi-talented artist talks about his music, his passion, acting and he shows off his extensive collection of sports memorabilia.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Using archive footage, dramatic reenactment, and interviews with his closest companions, Final 24 details the last 24 hours of Jim Morrison’s life.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Uncut Story: 1942-1961
programme.desc: Part I of this series takes us through Jimi's life in Seattle, Washington where he lived the majority of his twenty-seven years. Through the recollection of his closest friends and family, we enter into the inner world of Jimi's upbringing.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Snoop Dogg
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Snoop Dogg. Snoop Dogg's story is told chronologically through his major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Final 24 delves into the Prince of Motown’s violent childhood to uncover the root of Marvin’s strained relationship with his strict father and to understand his struggle with drugs.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who's down there?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Freaky as hell!"
programme.desc: In this episode, the Are You Haunted team investigates a venue with a rather sinister history. Could this be tied into the reports of possible paranormal activity reported here? Plus, Dale and Ben investigate a mysterious 'room'; what was it used for?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Step out of the darkness"
